summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RunKumbh registration form extended fields. All 12+ new fields (Name, Gender, DOB, Mobile, Email, T-shirt Size, Marathon Experience, Emergency Contact Name/Number, Medical Condition with conditional textarea, and 5 Consent Checkboxes) are working correctly. Backend API accepts all fields and creates Stripe checkout sessions. Contact section displays correct organizer names with titles on separate lines. Google Maps link is clickable and opens in new tab.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing events from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All registration form extended fields are working. Backend API at /api/payments/checkout/session accepts all 12+ fields including DOB, gender, tshirt_size, marathon_experience, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact, has_medical_condition, medical_condition_details, and 5 consent boolean fields. Stripe integration is live and working. Contact section shows Lt. Raghu G M (Event Manager), KS Pranav (Event Coordinator), Prajeet Gurlahosur (Event Coordinator) with correct phone numbers. Google Maps link opens in new tab.
